name: 11413-mcp-parse-error-banner
_purpose: Visual evidence for warpdotdev/warp#11413 (oz-for-oss review 2026-06-10). Demonstrates the new Settings → MCP Servers parse-error banner appearing when ~/.warp-oss/.mcp.json contains an unresolved environment-variable reference (${UNDEFINED_ENV_VAR_FOR_PARSE_ERROR_DEMO}). Before this PR all four parse-failure sites in parse_mcp_config_file silently returned vec![]; this recipe captures the new structured error rendering. With the notify() fix in refresh_file_based_server_cards (this revision), the banner is reactive to ConfigParsed events even when no server cards were ever created.
_safety: Recipe only navigates Settings; no MCP servers are saved or modified. The broken ~/.warp-oss/.mcp.json was authored intentionally for this evidence run and contains no real credentials.
_phases: A: launch warp-oss with the broken MCP config in place
E: wait for the parse-error banner to render
F: capture screenshot of the banner
